channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Virginia voters OK a Democratic effort to redraw the state's congressional map
item.description: Virginia voters have delivered a significant win to Democrats, as the party aims to pick up four more U.S. House seats in the state.
item.content:encoded:
Virginia voters have delivered a significant win to Democrats, as the party aims to pick up four more U.S. House seats in the state.

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
item.dc:creator: Ashley Lopez

item.title: Southern Poverty Law Center indicted on federal fraud charges
item.description: The Justice Department alleges that the SPLC improperly raised millions of dollars to pay informants to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan and other extremist groups.
item.content:encoded:
The Justice Department alleges that the SPLC improperly raised millions of dollars to pay informants to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan and other extremist groups.

(Image credit: Jacquelyn Martin)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Instead of civil war, a naked mole rat colony changed queens peacefully
item.description: These matriarchal rodents often have bloody succession wars to replace their queen. But in a colony in California, Queen Tere ceded the throne to her daughter, Arwen, without violence.
item.content:encoded:
These matriarchal rodents often have bloody succession wars to replace their queen. But in a colony in California, Queen Tere ceded the throne to her daughter, Arwen, without violence.

(Image credit: Evgeniya Moskova/iStockphoto)
item.dc:creator: Pien Huang

item.title: As Pakistan seeks to broker U.S.–Iran peace, citizens watch for gains at home
item.description: As Pakistan works to broker peace between the U.S. and Iran, many Pakistanis are watching closely to see whether the diplomatic boost will translate into improvements at home.
item.content:encoded: As Pakistan works to broker peace between the U.S. and Iran, many Pakistanis are watching closely to see whether the diplomatic boost will translate into improvements at home.
item.dc:creator: Betsy Joles

item.title: Florida AG launches criminal investigation into ChatGPT over FSU shooting
item.description: Florida's attorney general is launching a criminal investigation into the alleged role of ChatGPT in a mass shooting at Florida State University last year.
item.content:encoded:
Florida's attorney general is launching a criminal investigation into the alleged role of ChatGPT in a mass shooting at Florida State University last year.

(Image credit: Miguel J. Rodriguez Carrillo)
item.dc:creator: Tristan Wood

item.title: Florida Democrat Rep. Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick, facing possible expulsion, resigns
item.description: The Florida Democrat faced a potential expulsion vote in the House as she prepares for a federal trial on allegations that she stole disaster funds and used some of the money to finance her campaign.
item.content:encoded:
The Florida Democrat faced a potential expulsion vote in the House as she prepares for a federal trial on allegations that she stole disaster funds and used some of the money to finance her campaign.

(Image credit: Andrew Harnik)
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel

item.title: Want to lighten your mental load? First, let go of these gender myths
item.description: "Men can't see the mess." "Women are better at chores." These myths position women to take on more emotional thinking, says researcher Leah Ruppanner. She shares what works to reclaim your headspace.
item.content:encoded:
Drained: Reduce Your Mental Load to Do Less and Be More, busts pervasive cultural myths that keep a woman's mental load heavy.'/>

"Men can't see the mess." "Women are better at chores." These myths position women to take on more emotional thinking, says researcher Leah Ruppanner. She shares what works to reclaim your headspace.

(Image credit: Malte Mueller/Getty, Composite by NPR)
item.dc:creator: Andee Tagle

item.title: Trump extends U.S. ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request
item.description: The extension was announced just hours before it was set to expire. The president did not provide details on how long the new ceasefire extension will last.
item.content:encoded:
The extension was announced just hours before it was set to expire. The president did not provide details on how long the new ceasefire extension will last.

(Image credit: Aamir Qureshi)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire nears its end. And, Fed chair nominee faces tough hearing
item.description: The ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran is set to expire tomorrow. Peace talks between the countries remain uncertain. And, Trump's pick to lead the Federal Reserve faces a tough confirmation hearing today.
item.content:encoded:
The ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran is set to expire tomorrow. Peace talks between the countries remain uncertain. And, Trump's pick to lead the Federal Reserve faces a tough confirmation hearing today.

(Image credit: Atta Kenare)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran ends soon
item.description: The ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran ends soon. President Trump says a U.S. delegation is going to Pakistan for talks, but Iran hasn't confirmed their attendance.
item.content:encoded: The ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran ends soon. President Trump says a U.S. delegation is going to Pakistan for talks, but Iran hasn't confirmed their attendance.
item.dc:creator: Kat Lonsdorf
